message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "protection": "Clear definition of acceptance criteria and remedies for failure to meet them",
      "why_missing": "The contract lacks specific criteria for acceptance tests and remedies if the software fails to meet these criteria.",
      "risk": "Without clear acceptance criteria, the Company may face difficulties in holding the Developer accountable for software that does not meet its needs, leading to potential financial losses and project delays.",
      "mitigation": "Include a detailed section outlining the acceptance criteria, testing procedures, and remedies for failure to meet these criteria.",
      "suggested_clause": "The acceptance criteria for the software shall include specific performance metrics, functionality requirements, and user acceptance tests as outlined in Annex III. If the software fails to meet these criteria, Developer shall be obligated to remedy the failure within [NUMBER] days at no additional cost to Company.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.12",
      "source_clause_id": "65a8de99-bd28-4e5d-97f4-ca189e42ae59",
      "source_excerpt": "If the programs fail to perfom the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "protection": "Limitation of liability for Developer",
      "why_missing": "The contract does not specify any limitations on the Developer's liability for damages caused by software failures or delays.",
      "risk": "In the event of significant software failures, the Company may face substantial financial losses without recourse against the Developer.",
      "mitigation": "Include a clause that limits the Developer's liability to a certain amount or excludes certain types of damages.",
      "suggested_clause": "Developer's liability for any claims arising out of this Agreement shall be limited to the total amount paid by Company to Developer under this Agreement, and shall not include any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.9",
      "source_clause_id": "1d3092a3-4144-4005-a6d7-edb54adbe06f",
      "source_excerpt": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "protection": "Intellectual property rights for custom software",
      "why_missing": "The contract does not clearly define the ownership of intellectual property rights for the custom software developed.",
      "risk": "Without clear ownership terms, the Company may face challenges in using, modifying, or selling the software in the future.",
      "mitigation": "Add a clause that explicitly states that all intellectual property rights for the custom software developed shall belong to the Company upon full payment.",
      "suggested_clause": "All intellectual property rights in the custom software developed under this Agreement shall be owned exclusively by Company upon full payment to Developer. Developer shall assign all rights, title, and interest in the software to Company.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.1",
      "source_clause_id": "006d9839-ccae-4427-b454-0b1e923548a5",
      "source_excerpt": "Developer shall consult with Company personnel for the purpose of designing programming specifications.",
      "confidence": 0.8
    }
  ]
}
